ocr.text: In the context of Nestlé SA's agricultural commodity hedging and new product launch pipeline for January 2024, the first table
outlines various agricultural commodities and their corresponding hedging values in CHF.
Commodity  HedgingValue(CHF)
Volume(Tons)  PriceperTon(CHF)
AgriculturalCommodities  MarketTrends
CocoaProducts  CoffeeProducts  DairyProducts
HedgedVolume  HedgedPrice  RevenueImpact  NetIncomeImpact  CAPEX  2024Forecast  RiskExposure  ProfitMargin  Change(%)
CocoaBeans  5000  2500  12M  5M  1.2M  2.5%  10%  CoffeeBeans
3000  20M  8M  2M  4%  15%  TotalCommodities  22000  8300
47M  20M  4.5M  5%  16%  ForecastedGrowth  8%  MarketShare  30%
The CocoaBeans have a hedged volume of 5,000 tons at a hedged price of 2,500 CHF, resulting in a revenue impact of 12M
CHF and a net income impact of 5M CHF, with a CAPEX of 1.2M CHF, a 2024 forecast of 2.5%, a risk exposure of 10%, and a
profit margin change of 5%. For CoffeeBeans, the figures are a hedged volume of 7,000 tons, a hedged price of 2,800 CHF,
generating a revenue impact of 15M CHF, net income impact of 6M CHF, CAPEX of 1.5M CHF, a forecast of 3%, risk
exposure of 12%, and profit margin change of 4%. The DairyMilk shows a hedged volume of 10,000 tons at a hedged price of
20M CHF, with a revenue impact of 8M CHF, net income impact of 2M CHF, CAPEX of 4%, a forecast of 15%, risk exposure
of 16%, and a total commodities forecasted growth of 8%.
ProductLaunchOverview  FinancialMetrics  LaunchDate
ProductName  EstimatedRevenue  ProfitMargin  MarketShare
Beverage  CoffeeBlend  ProjectedUnitsSold  P/ERatio  Debt/Equity
Snack  GranolaBar  ProjectedRevenue  CurrentRatio  GrossMargin  LaunchRegion  Timing  Status
1  CoffeeDelight  CHF25M  20%  5%  Europe  Feb-2024  InProgress
2  NutriBar  CHF15M  15%  3%  Europe  Mar-2024  Planned
3  SparklingWater  CHF30M  25%  8%  Europe  Apr-2024  OnTrack
The second table presents a product launch overview with three entries: CoffeeDelight with estimated revenue of CHF25M,
profit margin of 20%, market share of 5%, launching in Europe in Feb-2024, and status InProgress; NutriBar, with projected
revenue of CHF15M, profit margin of 15%, market share of 3%, also in Europe, launching in Mar-2024, status Planned; and
SparklingWater with projected revenue of CHF30M, profit margin of 25%, market share of 8%, launching in Europe in Apr-
2024, and status OnTrack.
